title: Find Biased Features
text: BiasDetect feature-based Quality Control (QC) bias genes identification spatial transcriptomics snRNA-seq data types batch effect. BiasDetect method based binomial deviance model (Townes et al, 2019) applies cutoffs based standard deviation (SD) deviance rank difference metrics data-driven thresholding approach find batch-biased features.

title: Find Biased Features
text: BiasDetect R package available Bioconductor version 3.19 later. can install BiasDetect using following commands R session Bioconductor: Additionally, can install development version GitHub: Install additional required packages running package codes vignettes.
code: if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))     install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("BiasDetect")  ## Check Bioconductor installation BiocManager::valid() BiocManager::install("christinehou11/BiasDetect") pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "scran", "scry", "nnSVG") required_pkgs <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())] BiocManager::install(required_pkgs)

title: Find Biased Features
text: detailed tutorial available Find Biased Features written Jacqui Thompson.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
text: Function filter bias genes based selected selected threshold nSD deviance rank data frame plot.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
text: batch_df data.frame : Input data frame generated featureSelection() function using SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment object containing raw data. nSD_dev integer: Number standard deviation (nSD) deviance difference. default value 5. nSD_rank integer: Number standard deviation (nSD) rank difference. default value 5. visual logical: Whether display detected bias genes visualizations deviance rank. Default = FALSE return data frame. TRUE, returned format two parallel plots presenting bias genes based nSD_dev nSD_rank.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
text: output values identified bias genes. returned format can either data frame list two elements, giving option see either deviance rank plot.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
code: # library(spatialLIBD)  # batch_df <- featureSelect(spe, batch_effect = "brain", VGs = SVGs) # biasDetect(batch_df, nSD_dev = 5, nSD_rank = 6) # biasDetect(batch_df, nSD_dev = 5, nSD_rank = 6, visual = TRUE)

title: Feature Selection — featureSelect
text: Function conduct feature selection snRNA-seq spatial transcriptomics data calculate difference deviance rank without selected batch effect.

title: Feature Selection — featureSelect
text: input SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment: Input data can either SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment. assumed assays slot containing counts assay devianceFeatureSelection() successfully operate calculate deviance rank. logcounts strongly recommended included assays. Also, input data assumed set rownames(input) genes gene_name rowData(input). batch_effect character: Either batch slide subject based metadata available within input data. name slide subject within input object specified based different scenarios. VGs character: Highly Variable Genes (HVGs) SingleCelleExperiment object Spatially Variable Genes (SVGs) SpatialExperiment object. data frame, assumed contain one column identified variable genes column name "gene_name".

title: Feature Selection — featureSelect
text: input provided SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment object, output values returned data frame containing deviance rank without bacth effect, corresponding difference, corresponding nSD, gene, gene name, whether gene outlier defined chosen deviance rank cutoff.

title: Feature Selection — featureSelect
code: # library(spatialLIBD) # spe <- fetch_data(type = "spe")  # featureSelect(spe, batch_effect = "brain", VGs = SVGs)

title: Human Hippocampus . — spe
text: original data generated spatially-resolved transcriptomics (SRT) single-nucleus RNA-sequencing (snRNA-seq) data adjacent tissue sections anterior human hippocampus across ten adult neurotypical donors. SRT data generated using 10x Genomics Visium (n=36 capture areas) 10x Genomics Visium Spatial Proteogenomics (SPG) (n=8 capture areas). snRNA-seq data generated using 10x Genomics Chromium (n=26 total snRNA-seq libraries). original data processed using nnSVG() feature selection, spe_svgs dataset SpatialExperiment object containing 2098 spatially variable genes (SVGs).

title: BiasDetect 0.99.1
text: Added NEWS.md file track changes package. First full version package submitted Bioconductor.
